extension.description: Kanban board for managing Claude Code conversations
viewContainer.panel.title: 🐘 Claudine
view.panel.name: 🐘 Claudine
config.title: Claudine
config.imageGenerationApi.description: API to use for generating task icons
config.claudeCodePath.description: Path to Claude Code data directory
config.enableSummarization.description: Use Claude Code CLI to generate short summaries for conversation cards
config.toolbarLocation.description: Where to display the toolbar: inside the webview sidebar, in the VS Code panel title bar, or both
config.autoRestartAfterRateLimit.descrip: Automatically restart paused tasks when the Claude API rate limit resets
config.showTaskIcon.description: Show the icon / category badge on task cards
config.showTaskDescription.description: Show the description on task cards
config.showTaskLatest.description: Show the latest message on task cards
config.showTaskGitBranch.description: Show the git branch on task cards
walkthrough.gettingStarted.title: Get Started with Claudine
walkthrough.gettingStarted.description: Learn how to use the Claudine kanban board to manage your Claude Code conversations.
walkthrough.installClaude.title: Install Claude Code
walkthrough.installClaude.description:
Claudine requires the Claude Code extension to discover conversations.

[Open Extensions](command:workbench.extensions.search?%22anthropic.claude-code%22)
walkthrough.findBoard.title: Open the Board
walkthrough.findBoard.description:
Open the Claudine kanban board to see your conversations at a glance.

[Open Claudine Board](command:claudine.openKanban)
walkthrough.startConversation.title: Start a Conversation
walkthrough.startConversation.descriptio:
Create your first Claude Code conversation. It will appear on the board automatically.

[New Conversation](command:claudine.newConversation)
walkthrough.keyFeatures.title: Explore Key Features
walkthrough.keyFeatures.description:
Search, filter, drag-and-drop, and keyboard shortcuts to manage your board.

[Search Conversations](command:claudine.searchConversations)
walkthrough.agentIntegration.title: Set Up Agent Integration
walkthrough.agentIntegration.description:
Let Claude Code agents control the board automatically.

[Set Up Agent Integration](command:claudine.setupAgentIntegration)
